metadata.description: Comprehensive Claude Code skills and agents for homelab service management - media automation, infrastructure monitoring, document management, and more

plugins.name: homelab-core
plugins.description: Core homelab plugin bundling shared agents, commands, setup/health workflows, and the in-repo skill library until a skill graduates into its own standalone plugin repo.

plugins.name: overseerr-mcp
plugins.description: Overseerr media requests via MCP tools with HTTP fallback. Search movies and TV shows, submit requests, and monitor failed requests.

plugins.name: unraid-mcp
plugins.description: Query, monitor, and manage Unraid servers via GraphQL API through MCP tools with HTTP fallback. Supports system info, Docker, VMs, array/parity, notifications, plugins, rclone, and live telemetry. Requires unraid-mcp MCP server running.

plugins.name: unifi-mcp
plugins.description: UniFi network management via MCP tools. Monitor devices, clients, network health, firewall rules, and perform management operations.

plugins.name: gotify-mcp
plugins.description: Gotify push notifications and management via MCP tools with HTTP fallback. Sends alerts for long-running tasks, plan completions, and blocked states. Requires gotify-mcp MCP server running.

plugins.name: swag-mcp
plugins.description: SWAG reverse proxy configuration management via MCP. Create, edit, view, and manage nginx proxy configurations with auth integration.

plugins.name: synapse-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server providing Flux (Docker management) and Scout (SSH operations) tools for homelab infrastructure.

plugins.name: arcane-mcp
plugins.description: Manage Docker containers, images, volumes, networks, and stacks via the Arcane API.

plugins.name: syslog-mcp
plugins.description: Homelab syslog receiver plus MCP server for searching, tailing, and correlating logs across hosts.

plugins.name: plugin-lab
plugins.description: Agents, commands, skills, and scripts for scaffolding, reviewing, aligning, and deploying homelab MCP server plugins. Includes canonical Python, TypeScript, and Rust server templates.

plugins.name: bytestash
plugins.description: ByteStash code snippet management. Store, search, and organize code snippets.

plugins.name: gh-address-comments
plugins.description: Address GitHub PR review comments. Fetch, implement, and verify resolution of PR feedback.

plugins.name: linkding
plugins.description: Linkding bookmark management. Save, search, tag, and organize bookmarks.

plugins.name: memos
plugins.description: Memos note-taking service. Create, search, tag, and manage quick notes and memos.

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: Google NotebookLM integration. Create notebooks, add sources, generate podcasts, videos, and research artifacts.

plugins.name: paperless-ngx
plugins.description: Paperless-ngx document management. Upload, search, tag, and organize documents.

plugins.name: plex
plugins.description: Plex Media Server management. Browse libraries, search media, manage playlists, and monitor activity.

plugins.name: prowlarr
plugins.description: Prowlarr indexer management. Add, configure, test, and search indexers.

plugins.name: qbittorrent
plugins.description: qBittorrent download management. Add, monitor, pause, and manage torrent downloads.

plugins.name: radarr
plugins.description: Radarr movie management. Search, add, monitor, and manage movie collections.

plugins.name: radicale
plugins.description: Radicale CalDAV/CardDAV server management. Manage calendars, contacts, and address books.

plugins.name: sabnzbd
plugins.description: SABnzbd Usenet download management. Add, monitor, and manage NZB downloads.

plugins.name: sonarr
plugins.description: Sonarr TV series management. Search, add, monitor, and manage TV show collections.

plugins.name: tailscale
plugins.description: Tailscale VPN mesh network management. Monitor devices, manage routes, and check network status.

plugins.name: tautulli
plugins.description: Tautulli Plex monitoring. View activity, history, statistics, and user analytics.

plugins.name: zfs
plugins.description: ZFS storage management. Monitor pools, datasets, snapshots, scrubs, and replication.
